important_emails.subject: Hetzner Online GmbH - Invoice 081000981551 (K0520370026)
important_emails.body_preview:
Dear Mr Aung Myint,

Enclosed you will find your current invoice 081000981551 in PDF format.

The open invoice amount of $ 66.59 will soon be debited from your credit
card.

We bill for our services on a retrospective basis. This means that the
billing period for this invoice is the previous month.

For more information, please refer to the following article:
https://docs.hetzner.com/
